name: Devil's Island Insurgency
description: A highly effective insurgency operating on the volcanic island of Devil's Island, comprised of native 'Monk-eys' and exiled 'Aquatic Refugees'.
strategic_objective: Liberation of the vassal islands from the Coastal Theocracy

operational_arm.name: The Devil's Choice
operational_arm.operational_record: Two flawless jobs, leaving no witnesses and no mess.
